items.title: Here are the options for the 2028 swap/pick BOS got in the trade with PHI:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Here are the options for the 2028 swap/pick BOS got in the trade with PHI:

1. If LAC is 1-16 AND PHI is 1-8, then BOS gets the best of LAC/PHI/[lesser of BOS (top-1 protected)/SAS]

2. If LAC is 1-16 and PHI is 9-30, then BOS gets the best of LAC/[lesser of BOS (top-1 protected)/SAS]

1/4

items.title: Mike Gansey is the second straight lead executive to compel Sixers ownership to sign off on a style of roster construction which almost always necessitates being a luxury-tax team. If the Embiid/Maxey/Brown trio thrives, it’s imperative that the Sixers are willing to pay the tax.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey is the second straight lead executive to compel Sixers ownership to sign off on a style of roster construction which almost always necessitates being a luxury-tax team. If the Embiid/Maxey/Brown trio thrives, it’s imperative that the Sixers are willing to pay the tax.

media.title: Analysis: Looking at Jazz deal to send Walker Kessler to the Lakers from all sides
media.description: Did the Jazz get what they wanted? Did the Lakers? Did Walker Kessler?

items.title: Updated my Sixers cap sheet with the Jaylen Brown trade. Sixers Big 4 are all locked in through the 2028-29 season.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Updated my Sixers cap sheet with the Jaylen Brown trade. Sixers Big 4 are all locked in through the 2028-29 season.

Sixers still have $10.3m in space left under hard cap with 13 players under contract, up to $6m left of the MLE and a $4.2m trade exception to work with.

items.title: More news: The #Magic are signing center Colin Castleton to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
More news: The #Magic are signing center Colin Castleton to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com.

Orlando had previously extended Castleton a two-way qualifying offer so his return was expected.

items.title: Breaking News: The #Magic are signing second-round pick Izaiyah Nelson to a two-way contract, a league source told @orlandosentinel.com. Orlando selected Nelson with the No. 51 overall pick in this year’s draft.
